name: coalboard
description: CoalBoard — a consensus & debate board that convenes diverse lenses (with consent) to verify error-not-allowed work before it ships. Part of the TheColliery mining series.

plugins.name: coalboard
plugins.description: Consensus & debate board for error-not-allowed work (security/crypto, migrations, high-precision math). With consent it convenes diverse epistemic lenses in parallel (empirical/source-grounded, formal, a show-me skeptic), a judge synthesizes on VERIFIED inputs, an independent out-of-frame solver breaks ties, and the human signs off. Guarantees bounded cost (no whack-a-mole) and zero-breakage (staging); improves correctness without claiming a reliability number. Off ~90% of the time. Cross-agent (any subagent platform; Claude Code adds cost-optimized tiering). Zero-dependency, offline, no API keys. Beta.
